reviews.review_title: Not working the way it should be
reviews.review_description: This game isn't quite yet what I've expected i hope this will be updated, fixed and polished soon enough

developer_response.body: Sorry it didn't go as you hoped, it's an ongoing project, it will keep getting better and better, could you be more specific about what you expected and contact us at : https://suntzuworkshop.com/contact/

reviews.review_description: I have been playing for a while now, love the new content, keep it coming!

developer_response.body: Multiplayer mode and much more is on the way!

Hey it's OK not to like Zombie survival games, it's not for everyone, but if you leave a bad review at least explain what went wrong so we can fix it, or how we can improve the game, not just random insults.  That's called basic respect.

reviews.review_description: Good game but is a little buggy and feels unfinished

developer_response.body: It will never be finished, it's a never ending project!  Stay tuned for more content! Also, please share with us your gameplay so we can improve the game and fix the bugs you found : https://suntzuworkshop.com/contact/

reviews.review_description: This game is decent the only thing it could use is more dlots to hold thing and a barrier so things dont fall through the map. Other then that decent game

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review!  We are considering adding more slots to the belt, it will however make the game easier, we don't want it too easy either, managing items is part of the challenge.  Objects should no longer fall through the map, if you see any still falling, please contact us at https://suntzuworkshop.com/
we are glad you enjoy the blood animations xD

reviews.review_description: Amazing game right off the bat just longing for multiplayer

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review!  We appreciate the support! Thanks to players like you, our studio is rapidly growing and we should be able to provide the multiplayer mode by 2027!  This game is far from over, stay tuned for more content!
